name: Cuatro Remix
description: A simple highball cocktail made with Bacardí Añejo Cuatro rum, ginger ale, and a splash of pineapple juice. Don't let its golden colour fool you. Our versatile BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum is the perfect spirit for mixing delicious cocktails. Simply mix it with ginger ale and pineapple juice.
recipe_steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Build all ingredients directly in the glass.
searchable_text: Cuatro Remix main rum BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum A simple highball cocktail made with Bacardí Añejo Cuatro rum, ginger ale, and a splash of pineapple juice. Don't let its golden colour fool you. Our versatile BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum is the perfect spirit for mixing delicious cocktails. Simply mix it with ginger ale and pineapple juice. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum, 100 ml ginger ale, splash pineapple juice recipe steps Fill a highball glass with ice. Build all ingredients directly in the glass. Stir gently. Garnish with a lime wheel.
